modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: SharePoint Excel shows symbols instead of text in Petty Cash Log

full_description_text:  
I am having a problem with my SharePoint Petty Cash Log. It is showing random symbols instead of letters and numbers. Everyone else in my department can see it fine, but I can't. I don't know why this is happening to me.
short_description: SharePoint Excel shows symbols instead of text in Petty Cash Log
description: I am having a problem with my SharePoint Petty Cash Log. It is showing random symbols instead of letters and numbers. Everyone else in my department can see it fine, but I can't. I don't know why this is happening to me.
